description: Account inquiry — agent reads back full account number — critical compliance violation

transcript.full_text:
[00:00] Agent: Acme customer service, this is Priya.
[00:04] Customer: Hi, I need to check my account balance.
[00:07] Agent: Sure, what's your name?
[00:09] Customer: David Park.
[00:11] Agent: Okay David, your account number is 9981-2234-0056 and your balance is $1,240.00.
[00:19] Customer: Wait, you just said my full account number out loud. Is that safe?
[00:23] Agent: Oh, yes it's fine, don't worry about it.
[00:26] Customer: I'm not comfortable with that. Who else could be listening?
[00:30] Agent: It's just a phone call. Is there anything else?
[00:33] Customer: No. I'm going to file a complaint.

expected.compliance_notes: Agent read full account number — explicit critical violation per account_inquiry rules ('Do not read back full account number'). Also failed to verify identity before data access. Expect at least one critical compliance flag.
